core_payload.content:
# Generative AI Tile Assistant Concept

## 1. Purpose
Define an assistive AI layer that proposes tile design alternatives from style intent, room constraints, and catalog inventory.

## 2. Functional Scope
Interpret natural language prompts, generate multiple variants, and explain tradeoffs in cost and installation complexity.

## 3. Safety
Recommendations remain advisory and traceable with prompt and output provenance preserved.

## 4. Integration
This concept integrates with scanning and layout capsules to provide an auditable end to end design assistant.

neuro_concentrate.summary: This active concept capsule describes a generative AI assistant for TileSims that transforms style intent into explainable design alternatives. The assistant is scoped as advisory, requiring transparent scoring and clear tradeoff explanations across cost, visual complexity, and installation risk. It also enforces provenance capture for prompts, model outputs, and accepted revisions so decisions remain auditable over time. Integration targets include LiDAR acquisition and layout optimization capsules, creating a coherent pipeline from room capture to guided design choices and practical execution planning.
